===================
=== FOX WARFIELD NOV 11TH 1980 INFO - OCT 2008.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Fox Warfield Theatre, San Francisco, California
November 11th 1980

Quality:
Excellent Audience

Comments:
Excellent performance
Senr, Ain't Gonna Go To Hell For Anybody and Covenant Woman are highlights for me.

Comments about this reseed:
I downloaded LB-0683 from Hungercity in 2006 or 2007.
However, it appears that I changed the original SHN files into WAV, and then back to FLAC (instead of SHN).
So there is no loss in quality (been stored at the harddrive all the time), but this is not a "genuine" LB-0683 torrent (because it's FLAC now and not SHN).

The info file that came with the pasted in, below.
I have added covers, fingerprints and an MD5file.

Many thanks to the original uploader - whom I don't know the name...and of course; the taper

Selfmade Artwork included.....the photo used for the front comes from 1981...scanned from a book of mine.


TRACKLIST:

DISC 1:

01 Gotta Serve Somebody
02 I Believe In You
03 Like A Rolling Stone
04 'Til I get it Right
05 Man Gave Names To All The Animals
06 Simple Twist Of Fate
07 Ain't Gonna Go To Hell For Anybody
08 Girl From The North Country
09 Slow Train Coming

DISC 2:

01 Walk Around Heaven All Day
02 Abraham, Martin And John
03 Let's Keep It Between Us
04 Covenant Woman
05 Solid Rock
06 Just Like A Woman
07 Senr (The Tales Of Yankee Power)
08 When You Gonna Wake Up
09 In The Garden
10 Blowin' In The Wind
11 City Of Gold
12 It's All Over Now, Baby Blue


Enjoy... Erik_Snow

---------------------------------------------------------
original info_file:
---------------------------------------------------------

Bob Dylan, 11/11/80, Fox Warfield Theatre, San Francisco, CA, 2CDR

LB-683, (48min +57min), alternate b, excellent sound, upgrade, Master Audience;, has several spots of noise in background at beginning of first few songs and d2t1 which sounds like mics getting adjusted, sounds like it most likely is also from the jf master source; compared with one labled as from the jf source, this one has a little lower levels with more dynamic range, is not as harsh, has more clarity, brightness, warmth, and has less hiss; (this is same version as my dat except has girls songs) ; (however jf did not record any shows in 1980) (a bittorrent from 10/06 was similar in wav and spectrral views described as "Lineage>cdr in trade>EAC>Flac>Dime; I'm pretty sure this is a copy of LB-683")

CD1

01 Gotta Serve Somebody, 02 I Believe In You, 03 Like A Rolling Stone, 04 Gospel - 'Til I Get It Right, 05 Man Gave Names To All The Animals, 06 Simple Twist Of Fate, 07 Ain't Gonna Go To Hell For Anybody, 08 Girl From The North Country, 09 Slow Train,

CD2

01 Gospel - Walkin' Around Heaven All Day, 02 Abraham Martin And John, 03 Let's Keep It Between Us, 04 Covenant Woman, 05 Solid Rock, 06 Just Like A Woman, 07 Senor, 08 When You Gonna Wake Up?, 09 In The Garden, 10 Blowin' In The Wind, 11 City Of Gold, 12 It's All Over Now Baby Blue 

Please retain this info file and its LB number as a marker for this lossless set
and if you spread it please list it in the description to avoid others getting duplicates.
===================
===================
===================
=== Txt Infos.txt
===================
===================
===================

http://www.pinkrobert.net/login.php?returnto=%2Fbrowse.php%3Fincldead%3D1



Bob Dylan
Fox Warfield Theatre, San Francisco, California
November 11th 1980

Quality:
Excellent Audience

Comments:
Excellent performance
Senr, Ain't Gonna Go To Hell For Anybody and Covenant Woman are highlights for me.

Comments about this reseed:
I downloaded LB-0683 from Hungercity in 2006 or 2007.
However, it appears that I changed the original SHN files into WAV, and then back to FLAC (instead of SHN).
So there is no loss in quality (been stored at the harddrive all the time), but this is not a "genuine" LB-0683 torrent (because it's FLAC now and not SHN).

The info file that came with the pasted in, below.
I have added covers, fingerprints and an MD5file.

Many thanks to the original uploader - whom I don't know the name...and of course; the taper

Selfmade Artwork included.....the photo used for the front comes from 1981...scanned from a book of mine.


TRACKLIST:

DISC 1:

01 Gotta Serve Somebody
02 I Believe In You
03 Like A Rolling Stone
04 'Til I get it Right
05 Man Gave Names To All The Animals
06 Simple Twist Of Fate
07 Ain't Gonna Go To Hell For Anybody
08 Girl From The North Country
09 Slow Train Coming

DISC 2:

01 Walk Around Heaven All Day
02 Abraham, Martin And John
03 Let's Keep It Between Us
04 Covenant Woman
05 Solid Rock
06 Just Like A Woman
07 Senr (The Tales Of Yankee Power)
08 When You Gonna Wake Up
09 In The Garden
10 Blowin' In The Wind
11 City Of Gold
12 It's All Over Now, Baby Blue


Enjoy... Erik_Snow

---------------------------------------------------------
original info_file:
---------------------------------------------------------

Bob Dylan, 11/11/80, Fox Warfield Theatre, San Francisco, CA, 2CDR

LB-683, (48min +57min), alternate b, excellent sound, upgrade, Master Audience;, has several spots of noise in background at beginning of first few songs and d2t1 which sounds like mics getting adjusted, sounds like it most likely is also from the jf master source; compared with one labled as from the jf source, this one has a little lower levels with more dynamic range, is not as harsh, has more clarity, brightness, warmth, and has less hiss; (this is same version as my dat except has girls songs) ; (however jf did not record any shows in 1980) (a bittorrent from 10/06 was similar in wav and spectrral views described as "Lineage>cdr in trade>EAC>Flac>Dime; I'm pretty sure this is a copy of LB-683")

[setlist - edited]

Please retain this info file and its LB number as a marker for this lossless set
and if you spread it please list it in the description to avoid others getting duplicates.
===================
